# WAF Checker

> A web tool to test how well your Web Application Firewall (WAF) blocks common attacks. Built as a Cloudflare Worker with TypeScript. Provides a web UI for running various attack payloads against your target and analyzing results.

## Repository

- [GitHub](https://github.com/SecH0us3/waf-checher): Source code and issue tracking.

## Documentation

- [README](README.md): Comprehensive guide on features, usage, and project structure.

## Core Logic

- [Main Server](app/src/api.ts): Main server logic handling request routing and payload sending.
- [Payloads](app/src/payloads.ts): Base attack categories and payloads.
- [Advanced Payloads](app/src/advanced-payloads.ts): Advanced WAF bypass payloads including double encoding and polyglots.
- [WAF Detection](app/src/waf-detection.ts): Logic for detecting WAFs based on response headers and behavior.
- [HTTP Manipulation](app/src/http-manipulation.ts): HTTP protocol manipulation tests.
- [Batch Testing](app/src/batch.ts): Logic for testing multiple URLs concurrently.
- [Reporting](app/src/reporting.ts): Result export and vulnerability scoring.
- [Encoding](app/src/encoding.ts): Payload encoding and obfuscation utilities.

## Frontend

- [UI Logic](app/src/static/main.js): Frontend logic for the web interface.
- [Styles](app/src/static/style.css): Custom styling for the application.
